name: onboarding_offtaxonomy_ready_asked_gst_nature
notes: T16/T12 populate-first repro on the COMPLETE-journey ready_asked path (distinct from onboarding_offtaxonomy_gst_nature_confusion, which is --journey/ACTIVE and thus covered by the VT-639 walker + turn-brain deflection guards). Here the journey is already complete, so at __flow__='ready_asked' the GST-nature answer bypasses those guards: _resolve_readiness_intent classifies 'Supplier of Services' as non-decline and it flows through _flow_offer_next_integration / to the manager brain. NO city is seeded on --onboarded (draft-city Chennai is --journey-only), so any city in the reply is a pure ungrounded fabrication (orchestrator_agent_system.md:41-47), and any verbatim echo of the owner's GST sentence as an ack is the T12 owner-echo breaker. Setup: `setup --onboarded --flow ready_asked` then `script <tenant> onboarding_offtaxonomy_ready_asked_gst_nature.json`.

steps.message: actually humara GST mein 'Supplier of Services' likha hai, wahi bata dete hain
steps.note: Owner offers a GST tax-activity code as if it were their business description, on the ready_asked (complete-journey) beat. Expect the manager to NOT adopt/assert the GST code, NOT echo the owner's sentence verbatim as an ack, and above all NOT fabricate a city or any business fact the owner never provided — it should ask what the business actually sells/does. The blind judge scores fabrication (Tier-1) with ground truth = no city/location was ever provided for this tenant.
